summary: Made a surgical seam pass to differentiate Chapter 2's entry from the adjacent quarry-morning opening and to sharpen the handoff into Elise's first withheld report omission.
edits: Reframed the opening around Clemence's arrival and the bucket strike so the chapter no longer opens on the same wake-in-the-quarry scaffold used by the next chapter.
Kept the original opening information and tone while shifting the first action and spatial anchor to Clemence at the gallery mouth.
Adjusted the final line so Elise's withheld report more directly hands off to the next chapter's omission calculus.
